narrative:
Hanover Village (precinct in Licking County) has 975 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.7 percentage points.
